response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and D-language engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum, plus 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems and 3 years of software design/architecture leadership in a cloud-compute context. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and no cloud-compute platform, distributed-systems-at-scale, or formal tech-lead experience. Core qualifications are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across backend, frontend, and embedded
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
Experience with high-throughput services (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, millions of req/s)
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (only ~6 months of C/C++ at NI)
No internal cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-systems leadership experience
No formal technical lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: No cloud compute platform / distributed systems leadership
Strong mentoring and teaching track record
